zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Graham於大約1242年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯時，他的父親Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith37歲，母親Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith33歲。他於1269年與Mary Strathearn在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire林利斯格福享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Graham于大约1242年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith37岁，母亲Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith33岁。他于1269年与Mary Strathearn在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1304年在苏格兰Linlithgowshire林利斯格福享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Graham was born about 1242, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, was 37 and his mother, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, was 33. He married Mary Strathearn in 1269, in Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1304, in Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Graham est né environ 1242, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mary Strathearn en 1269, à Abercorn, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1304, à Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland: Abercorn, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Graham um 1242 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith 37 und seine Mutter Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith 33. Er hat 1269 in Abercorn, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Graham è nato il circa 1242 nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mary Strathearn nel 1269, nel Abercorn, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1304, nel Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Grahamが約1242年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeithは37歳，母Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeithは33歳であった。1269年にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンアバーコルンでMary Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireリンリスゴウで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Graham(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1269년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 압르코른에서 Mary Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 린리스고에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Graham родился около 1242 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Strathearn в 1269 г. в местности абиркорн, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1304 г. в местности линьлитгоу, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Mary Strathearn en 1269, en Abercorn, West Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
